violations.text: Slice Cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
Crab meat was observed in an intact ROP package thawing in the walk in cooler at 41 DF. ROP crab meat was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
The floor in the walk in cooler area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2025

Marinara Sauce, chowder, and cucumber salad packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024

The cutting boards in the back prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024
The glass on the deli case is not in good repair. The handle on the one door freezer is in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2024
The door to the back toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/17/2024

The ceiling tiles on the sales floor are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Correct by July 10 2024 The floor in the walk in cooler are in poor repair. The floor must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
